keyFeatures.en: Creates professional, brand-aligned slides with clean layouts in minutes.
keyFeatures.zh: 几分钟内创建专业、品牌对齐的简洁布局幻灯片。

keyFeatures.en: Automatically generates slides, organizes content, and applies design styles.
keyFeatures.zh: 自动生成幻灯片，组织内容并应用设计样式。

keyFeatures.en: Allows customization of design styles and layouts.
keyFeatures.zh: 允许自定义设计样式和布局。

description.en: Generate and edit PPTs for free with limited features.
description.zh: 免费生成和编辑PPT，但功能有限。

description.en: Unlimited features with no limits on file size or commercial use.
description.zh: 无限制的文件大小和商业用途。

description.en: Customizable features with dedicated support and advanced analytics.
description.zh: 可定制的功能，专属支持和高级分析。

weaknesses.en: Limited features in the free tier, which may not be sufficient for all users.
weaknesses.zh: 免费版功能有限，可能无法满足所有用户的需求。

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support, which could be a concern for some users.
weaknesses.zh: 未明确提及客户支持，这可能让一些用户担心。

targetAudience.en: Individuals and teams looking to create professional presentations quickly and easily.
targetAudience.zh: 希望快速轻松地创建专业演示文稿的个人和团队。

positioning.en: Dokie AI positions itself as an AI-driven presentation tool that simplifies the creation and editing process for users.
positioning.zh: Dokie AI 定位为一种以AI驱动的演示工具，简化了用户的创建和编辑过程。
